name: Psylocke and Luna | Beach Relaxation
description:
“It’s a lot hotter today than I thought..” “Oh? Want me to help cool you down then~?”

Don’t mind that thing in the back

Summer time! I immediately bought the battlepass for luna since I’m a lord on her, and I’m working towards earning that psylocke skin since I also main her..how lucky for me! This summer event has all my mains! Including Thor!

Btw, I just got Yuzuha’s Wengine, and she is so fun to play! Definitely worth the amount of money I spent..

Anyways I hope you all enjoy the bot! And I hope everyone had a great summer

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 🩵🩷

(I really miss having photos..)
creator: Capt
